name: showcase
_comment: Slice AV material-graph showcase. baseColor = Lerp(TextureSample(checker), Constant(tint), Fresnel(power=3)) so the sphere shows a textured base that blends toward the warm tint at grazing angles (a fresnel rim). metallic/roughness are constants. Build-time codegen -> shaders/generated/mat_showcase.frag.hlsl -> the same HLSL->SPIR-V->MSL toolchain.
